summary: Tested customer self-create-order feature end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass (create success, default address fallback, 401 unauth, 400 prohibited=false, 400 empty description, my-boxes sorting/isolation, admin visibility). Frontend E2E: login → dashboard banner → dialog with prohibited-items list → submit disabled until checkbox → success screen with box_id + QR → new order appears in list → admin /admin/boxes shows 'KH tự tạo' badge. All 16 requested test cases verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py customer_create_order: pickup_time stored as raw ISO string from client without validation. If client sends malformed string, downstream date parsing (e.g. toLocaleString in UI) may break silently. Consider parsing to datetime and rejecting invalid.

CreateOrderDialog stores date+time as `${date}T${time}:00` (local, no timezone). Backend saves verbatim; when admin later views this could be misinterpreted as UTC. Consider appending timezone offset or normalizing to ISO with Z.
server.py exceeds 700 lines (~713). Splitting auth+customer-order routes into a separate router module recommended for maintainability.
No max-length validation on item_description / notes — could allow abuse. Consider Field(..., max_length=1000).
test_credentials: Existing user tranvanb@test.com / test123 used for E2E. Pytest creates fresh TEST_ users each run.
seed_data_creation: E2E left one new customer-created box (E2E TEST 3 hộp đồ điện tử) on tranvanb@test.com account; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/create-order and GET /api/auth/my-boxes are solid. Frontend dialog (data-testid=create-order-button, order-item-description, order-pickup-date, order-pickup-time, order-pickup-address, order-notes, order-accept-no-prohibited, submit-order, close-success-dialog) all wired. Admin /admin/boxes renders KH tự tạo badge when created_by==='customer'.
